expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Reports on all 5 systems in the dashboard output block

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: Statuses shown: Watching, Installed, Connected, Synced, Idle
ATTENTION NEEDED section lists '4 PDF files in Downloads' and '7 media files in Downloads'

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Formatted as 'ECOSYSTEM STATUS' dashboard with timestamps, system entries, and attention section
